mapper.select:
select id, username, password, name, avatar, role, phone, email, create_time as createTime from admin
and username like concat('%', #{username}, '%')
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and id = #{currentUserId}
and 1 = 2
order by id desc
select id, username, password, name, avatar, role, phone, email, create_time as createTime from admin order by id desc
select id, username, password, name, avatar, role, phone, email, create_time as createTime from admin where id = #{id}
select id, username, password, name, avatar, role, phone, email, create_time as createTime from admin where username = #{username} limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into admin (username, password, name, avatar, role, phone, email) values (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{avatar}, #{role}, #{phone}, #{email})
